caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large silver headphones, and a black hoodie with the gold text "BOSS TALK" is seated in a studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE," and a blue banner above that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug sits on the desk with red and white text that includes "BOSS TALK". A small logo overlay reading "BOSS TALK" is also visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a slight smile while looking off-camera to the left. There is virtually no movement across the frames, with the man's posture and expression remaining consistent.
